R1-01.description_en: No left turn. Left-turn arrow with red prohibitory slash. All vehicles must not turn left here.
R1-01.guidance_en: Do not turn left. Go straight or turn right where permitted.

R1-02.description: Prohibitory sign: no right turn allowed at this location.
R1-02.guidance: Do not turn right. Continue straight or turn left where permitted.

KH-STOP.description: Drivers must come to a complete stop before the stop line or intersection.
KH-STOP.guidance: Reduce speed, stop completely, check all directions, then proceed when safe.
